CardDescription.DefaultText: A water-powered metalworking workshop with an upgraded forge hammer for higher-quality tools.

CardHelpSection.DefaultText: Requirements: Requires local mill race for water power. Water-powered actions stop when water is frozen in winter. Operation: Drag firewood or charcoal onto the workshop forge to feed fuel, then light it with embers. The forge naturally heats to about 1000. Use Blast when water is flowing, or drag Bellows onto the lit forge by hand, to push the temperature high enough for smelting. Place heated metal tool blanks or copper parts in the inventory, then press Hammer All to apply one water-hammer strike to each item while water is flowing. Put six copper nuggets in the workshop inventory, then use Hammer Copper Sheet or Forge Copper Nails. The workshop hammer improves metal quality while shaping tools. Accepts: All heated tool blanks, heated lump of metal, copper gear parts, and any item tagged Heatable or Copper.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Feed wood or firewood into the forge firebox.
Feed firewood or other fuel into the forge firebox.
Feed charcoal or embers into the forge firebox.
Use lit tinder to light the forge fire.
Use lit tinder to light the forge fire.
Feed hot embers into the forge firebox.
Use bellows by hand to push the forge above natural heat.
Drag copper ore onto the hot forge to smelt it into an ingot.

FailMessage.DefaultText: The forge is not hot enough. Use Blast or Bellows first.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Drive the water leather bellows hard to push the forge to working heat. Requires fuel and a lit fire.
Apply one hammer strike to all items in the forge using the water-driven hammer.

FailMessage.DefaultText: Forge must be at working heat. Use Blast first.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Hammer six copper nuggets from the workshop inventory into a copper sheet.

FailMessage.DefaultText: Forge must be at working heat. Use Blast first.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Forge six copper nuggets from the workshop inventory into six copper nails.

FailMessage.DefaultText: Forge must be at working heat. Use Blast first.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Pour four copper nuggets from the workshop inventory into a mold to cast one unfinished metal lump.

FailMessage.DefaultText: Forge must be at working heat. Use Blast first.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Pack up the workshop back into a transportable kit.

CannotCookText.DefaultText: Temperature must reach 1300 to smelt this ore!
